articles.author: Associated Press
articles.title: China protests to Japan over alleged break-in at its embassy in Tokyo - Politico
articles.description: The two Asian powers have been increasingly at odds.
articles.content: Japans NHK public television said the suspect, believed to be a soldier in Japans army, or the Ground Self-Defense Force, was detained on the spot and handed over to Tokyo police for further investig… [+1010 chars]
